strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with experience in event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Proven track record in scaling engineering teams and fostering development practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital)
Hands-on experience with multi-agent AI workflows (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic frameworks at re:cinq)
concerns: Limited direct fintech or regulated-environment experience (e.g., credit systems, payment flows)
No explicit mention of real-time inference systems or production ML feature engineering in fintech contexts
Background lacks depth in agentic AI systems operating under financial/commercial constraints
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures and leadership in scaling teams, which are critical for a CTO role. However, his resume lacks direct experience in fintech infrastructure or regulated environments, and while he has some agentic AI work, it is not clearly tied to high-stakes commercial applications. His background suggests potential but requires deeper validation in fintech-specific domains.
